entities.description: A cereal crop affected by the sorghum shoot fly

entities.name: SORGHUM SHOOT FLY
entities.description: A pest insect of the species Atherigona soccata

entities.description: An attractant substance used for sampling shootfly populations

entities.description: A substance used in combination with fish meal for sampling shootflies

entities.name: SAMPLING
entities.description: The process of collecting shootfly populations for study

entities.name: YEAST
entities.description: A fungus used as an ingredient in attractant mixtures for shootflies

entities.name: AMMONIUM SULPHIDE
entities.description: A chemical compound used in potent attractant mixtures for shootflies

entities.name: AMINES
entities.description: Chemical compounds resulting from the biodegradation of fish meal that act as attractants

entities.name: BIODEGRADATION
entities.description: The biological breakdown of fish meal that increases its attractancy over time
